'''Raflkind Industrials''' produced numerous [[Radiation/Legends|radiation]] detectors and removers, ranging in size from handheld units (often hidden in jewelry and the like) to larger systems capable of shielding entire [[Starship/Legends|starships]].

{{Company-stub}}
